expo.name: drops
expo.description: drops - Discover the freshest EDM events and artists. Dive into the scene, explore genres, and catch the next drop.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: drops uses your location to find the freshest events near you.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: drops needs camera access to scan QR codes and connect with other ravers.
infoPlist.NFCReaderUsageDescription: drops uses NFC to quickly connect with other ravers and check vibe compatibility.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow drops to use your location to find nearby events.
